textByHashes.941291b9ac835f20711561ad09c5634651a621a9: I don't know what you think you are doing here human, but I do know that you will not live long enough to leave this place.
textByHashes.8121b2a19ea6a39072dbe20766aa2cda6c2a60eb: Welcome to the temple of Marimbo, child. In less busy times I would bless you, but I have not the luxury of free time at the moment.
textByHashes.2d6e00bb2c4081954cebe3f491c24330ffb205e6: However, feel free to stay here as long as you need.
